Package io.vertigo.datafactory.impl.collections.functions.index

Class IndexFilterFunction<D extends io.vertigo.datamodel.data.model.DataObject>

java.lang.Object
io.vertigo.datafactory.impl.collections.functions.index.IndexFilterFunction<D>
Type Parameters:
D - Object type
All Implemented Interfaces:
Function<io.vertigo.datamodel.data.model.DtList<D>,io.vertigo.datamodel.data.model.DtList<D>>, UnaryOperator<io.vertigo.datamodel.data.model.DtList<D>>
public final class IndexFilterFunction<D extends io.vertigo.datamodel.data.model.DataObject> extends Object implements UnaryOperator<io.vertigo.datamodel.data.model.DtList<D>>
List Function powered with index engine.

      public void sort(String fieldName, boolean desc)
      Set sort directives. Some directives can't be realized.

      desc - if sort desc
